findings.title: Probate gap — deceased lessor HANKS C W ESTATE OF (lease 1958-58563225)
findings.description: The lessor HANKS C W ESTATE OF on lease 1958-58563225 (recorded 1958-01-24) is indicated as deceased in the records. No Affidavit of Heirship, probate decree, or Record of Probate has been located in the county OPR linking heirs to this interest. The chain of title is therefore broken at this point for the undivided interest signed by this party.
findings.suggested_action: Locate heirs of HANKS C W ESTATE OF; obtain an Affidavit of Heirship and have it recorded in the county OPR. If a probate is open or closed in the appropriate jurisdiction, record a certified copy of the order. Until this is filed any conveyance from purported heirs is exposed.
findings.effort_display: 6–10 hr sr · county-clerk probate search · ~$300 rec.

summary.headline: 1 curative item
summary.body: 1 curative item identified across 13 tracts (1 critical). Each finding cites the specific instrument and the chain-of-title rationale; curative-effort estimates assume current East-Texas operator pricing. Findings flagged as historical should be confirmed against the recorded-release index before action — see Section V for the records expressly excluded from this examination.
